id="conn5" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs-task-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="rds-primary" value="PostgreSQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="250" y="500" /> <mxPoint x="400" y="500" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn6" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs-task-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;" target="rds-primary" value="PostgreSQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="850" y="500" /> <mxPoint x="400" y="500" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn7" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs-task-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="250" y="480" /> <mxPoint x="1080" y="480" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn8" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs-task-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="cloudwatch" value="Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="850" y="480" /> <mxPoint x="1080" y="480" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conn9" edge="1" parent="1" source="ecs-cluster" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;dashed=1;" target="iam" value="Assumes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arch-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Architecture Highlights:
• ECS Fargate (Serverless)
• Multi-AZ deployment
• RDS PostgreSQL 16.4
• Application Load Balancer
• Private subnets for database
• CloudWatch monitoring
• IAM least privilege" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="200" x="1050" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="security-note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Security Best Practices:
• RDS encryption enabled
• Private subnets for DB
• Security groups isolation
• Deletion protection
• Automated backups (7 days)
• SSL/TLS for connections
• IAM roles for ECS tasks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="200" x="1050" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Architecture Highlights:
• ECS Fargate (Serverless)
• Multi-AZ deployment
• RDS PostgreSQL 16.4
• Application Load Balancer
• Private subnets for database
• CloudWatch monitoring
• IAM least privilege

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.div:
Security Best Practices:
• RDS encryption enabled
• Private subnets for DB
• Security groups isolation
• Deletion protection
• Automated backups (7 days)
• SSL/TLS for connections
• IAM roles for ECS tasks
